input.cmd: /bin/zsh -lc "docker exec sreft-fa-load sh -c 'for i in "'$(seq 1 30); do wget -q -O /dev/null -S http://web:8080/orders 2>&1 | awk "/HTTP'"\\//{code=\\"'$2} END{print code}"; done'"'"
/bin/zsh -lc 'for i in $(seq 1 30); do curl -s -o /tmp/sreft-web-body -w '"'%{http_code} %{time_total}\\n' http://localhost:8085/orders; done"
/bin/zsh -lc 'for i in $(seq 1 10); do curl -s -o /dev/null -w '"'%{http_code} %{time_total}\\n' http://localhost:8085/orders; done"
